title: GPT-4 - What Changed?
description: Today we'll play around with both GPT-3 and GPT-4, comparing them as we go, to see what all the fuss is really about. I'll also show you that making this algorithm resistant to divulging unauthorized information is quite hard by tricking it into sharing some information it probably should not.

title: Generative AI - A Conversation With ChatGPT
description: I've been getting a lot of questions about ChatGPT and generative AI, mainly the impact the technology will have. I decided to ask ChatGPT for some answers.

title: Meditations On Tinkering
description: On the power of taking into consideration that which you do not know about.

title: A primer on financial independence
description: My thoughts on Financial Independence, and a quick primer into the subject.

title: Custom Models And Loss Functions In FastAI
description: Learn how to recognize handwritten digits, using a custom PyTorch model and loss function.

title: Detecting fruit using FastAI
description: If you've ever wanted your own photo based scanning device, you're on the right blog.
